PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(90\); $ready = $false; while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\) { try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:8765/health -TimeoutSec 2; $ready = $true; break } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 3 } }; if \($ready\) { Write-Output "HEALTH OK:"; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Compress } else { Write-Output "NO RESPONDE tras 90s" })

PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(150\); $ready = $false; while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\) { try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:8765/health -TimeoutSec 2; $ready = $true; break } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 5 } }; if \($ready\) { Write-Output "HEALTH OK:"; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Compress } else { Write-Output "NO RESPONDE tras 150s mas" })

PowerShell(try { $s = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:8765/camera/start -Method Post -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output "CAMERA START: $\($s | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)" } catch { Write-Output "camera/start fallo: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $f = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:8765/camera/frame -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "CAMERA FRAME: status=$\($f.StatusCode\) bytes=$\($f.RawContentLength\) tipo=$\($f.Headers['Content-Type']\)" } catch { Write-Output "camera/frame fallo: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $w = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:8765/recognition/words -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "WORDS: $\($w | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)" } catch { Write-Output "words fallo" }; try { $sen = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:8765/recognition/sentence -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "SENTENCE: $\($sen | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)" } catch { Write-Output "sentence fallo" })
